1994October 21, 1994

🇺🇸 Greenville, SC, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Greenville, United States, October 21, 1994 -- October 31, 1994

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1994-10-greenville-sc-usa

20 Resolutions

229Plenary
Establish a liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 21/WG 3/CSMF
SC 4 expresses its desire to establish a liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 21/WG 3/CSMF.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
228Plenary
Appoint Neal Laurance as a physical liaison to ISO/TC 184/SC 5
SC 4 appoints Neal Laurance as a physical liaison to ISO/TC 184/SC 5.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
227Plenary
Direct WG 6 to complete Parts 33 and 34 and ATS projects
SC 4 directs WG 6 to complete Parts 33 and 34 and to submit them, before January 1995, for QIE approvals prior to CD ballot.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
226Plenary
Amend approval procedures for registering an AP successfully passing CD
SC 4 directs its Secretariat to amend its approval procedures for registering an application protocol that has successfully passed the CD enquiry to include providing evidence of validation through...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
225Plenary
Amend approval procedures for advancing an AP to CD stage
SC 4 directs its Secretariat to amend its approval procedures for advancing an application protocol to CD stage to include providing evidence of substantive international review of the ARM and the ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
224Plenary
Establish Category A liaison with the ProSTEP Association
SC 4 expresses its desire to establish a Category A liaison with the ProSTEP Association.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
223Plenary
Distribute status report on SC 4 projects prior to each meeting
The SC 4 Secretariat shall distribute, at least six weeks prior to each SC 4 meeting, a report on the status of SC 4 projects. This report shall have the following attributes: A summary sheet showi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
222Plenary
Direct Architecture WG to propose strategic policy alternative solutions
SC 4 directs the Architecture WG to propose realistic strategic policy alternative solutions to the requirements defined in SPAG document N124.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
221Plenary
Approve requirement for an SC 4 strategic policy on APs
SC 4 approves the requirement for an SC 4 strategic policy on Application Protocols as set forth in the following SPAG document N124 "Requirements for a SC 4 Strategic Policy on Application Protoco...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
220Plenary
Approve WG 2 Strategic Policy Statement
SC 4 approves SC 4 N242, WG 2 Strategic Policy Statement.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
219Plenary
Set up a quality assurance system within the SC 4 organization
SC 4 directs its Secretariat to set up a quality assurance system within the SC 4 organization according to ISO/TC 184/SC 4 document N230, Requirements for Future Capabilities of SC 4 standards, ob...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
218Plenary
Approve Requirements for Future Capabilities of SC 4 Standards
SC 4 approves SC 4 N230, Requirements for Future Capabilities of SC 4 Standards, and requests that PMAG map it into an operational plan of operations.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
217Plenary
Establish working group to resolve technical direction
SC 4 establishes a new working group to resolve the technical direction and related technical issues of SC 4 so that the results are consistent with the SC 4 vision and acceptable to SC 4 as a whol...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
216Plenary
Request investigation into organizational framework for STEP implementations
SC 4 requests all member bodies to investigate possible remedies to this need. The workshop concept established in the OSI-MMS environment for this purpose shall be taken into account. Member bodie...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
215Plenary
Add revision to EXPRESS Language Reference Manual to work program
SC 4 directs its Secretariat to add to its program of work a project titled "Revision to the EXPRESS Language Reference Manual ISO 10303-11". Further, SC 4 confirms Dr. Phil Spiby as Project Leader...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
214Plenary
Cancel projects 41 and 73 due to lack of activity
SC 4 agrees to cancel projects 41 and 73, Application Protocol on Mechanical Design Using Wireframe Representation, 10303-206, and its corresponding ATS, 10303-1206, due to lack of activity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
213Plenary
Cancel project 60 and corresponding ATS due to lack of activity
SC 4 agrees to cancel project 60, Application Protocol on Dimensional Inspection Process Planning for Coordinate Measuring Machines 10303-219, and its corresponding ATS, 10303-1219, due to lack of ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
212Plenary
Cancel project 16 due to lack of activity
SC 4 agrees to cancel project 16, Integrated Generic Resources on Form Features 10303-48, due to lack of activity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
211Plenary
Define effective date for project cancellation
SC 4 cancellation of a project shall become effective four months after date of action unless a project leader and resources are brought forth to the Secretariat in conformance with ISO new work it...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere thanks to its Chairman, Bradford Smith, to the team at NIST, and to all those who contributed to the on-time delivery of the Initial Release of STEP to Geneva for publica...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
